title: POST /follow and /unfollow: outbound Follow, handle pending state
description:
POST /api/v1/accounts/:id/follow: enqueue Follow{object: remote_actor_uri} activity to their inbox. Do NOT create follows row yet — wait for inbound Accept (handled in Phase 2). Return a Relationship object with requested=true. When Accept arrives (Phase 2 handler), create follows row. POST /api/v1/accounts/:id/unfollow: remove follows row (or follow_requests), enqueue Undo{Follow}.

Test discipline:
- Follow remote account → Follow activity enqueued, relationship.requested=true
- Follow already-following → idempotent, return current relationship
- Unfollow → follows row removed, Undo{Follow} enqueued
- Relationship object: fetch mastodon.social /api/v1/accounts/relationships oracle

Defensive programming:
- Prevent self-follow: account cannot follow itself
- Pending follow state: if follow enqueued but Accept not yet received, relationship.requested=true, relationship.following=false
acceptance_criteria: Follow enqueues activity and sets requested=true; Accept creates follows row; unfollow removes and enqueues Undo; self-follow rejected
close_reason: Follow/unfollow with outbound already in interactions.rs
